reviews.positive:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Amazing stay at Sky Luxury Apartment!

I had a wonderful experience at Sky Luxury Apartment. The apartment was very clean, modern, and beautifully designed, with everything needed for a comfortable stay. The location is perfect — quiet but close to the city center, making it easy to explore Shkodër.

The host was very friendly, helpful, and always available for any questions. Check-in was smooth and well organized, and the apartment felt safe and relaxing.

I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Shkodër. I will definitely come back again!

Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Aufenthalt. Es war sehr sauber und groß. Die Gastgeberin war total freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden gerne wieder kommen. Danke für alles!!
